name: PB and o Snackers
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Old fashioned rolled oats (not quick-cooking)
1 cup Peanut butter, chunky or smooth
1 1/2 cups Semisweet chocolate chips or raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the oats, flour, spices, salt and baking soda to combine.
2. Using an electric mixer on medium speed, cream the butter, peanut butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar until light and fluffy, about 3-4 minutes. Scrape the bowl as needed.
3. Add the eggs one at a time, beating for 1 minute after each addition. Beat in the vanilla extract.
4. Reduce the mixer speed to low and add the dry ingredients slowly, beating only until blended. Stir in the chocolate chips or raisins.
5. (If the dough is not chilled, drop by rounded tablespoonfuls onto lightly greased baking sheets. If the dough is chilled, scoop by rounded tablespoons, roll into balls between your palms, and place about 2 inches apart on the baking sheets.)
6. Press the cookies gently with the heel of your hand until they are about 1/2 inch thick.
7. Bake at 350°F for 13-15 minutes, until the cookies are golden and just firm around the edges.
8. Lift the cookies onto a cooling rack using a wide metal spatula. The cookies will firm as they cool.
